label: Determined Eye Alarm
prompt:
Create a premium iOS app icon for WakeSaga, an anime alarm app that makes waking up feel like the cold open of a shonen episode.
Symbol: extreme close-up of one determined anime eye and brow filling almost the whole icon, shaped subtly like an alarm clock face with two small bell-like hair silhouettes at the top. The expression must read determined, focused, ready to wake up, not cute and not angry villain.
Style: bold flat-cel anime, dark ink-navy background, warm skin/paper highlights, one crimson wake signal accent reflected in the eye, strong center mass, premium app icon polish.
Composition: face crop is massive and iconic, no full head, no body, no scene, no detailed hair strands; reads as a single graphic mark at 44px.
Constraints: square 1024x1024, opaque full-bleed, no text, no letters, no numbers, no UI, no phone, no watermark, no border, no realistic celebrity likeness, no tiny features, no horror.

prompt:

Composition: huge face crop fills the safe area; one bold silhouette; no background scene; no full face outline if it hurts small-size readability.
Constraints: square 1024x1024, opaque full-bleed, no text, no letters, no numbers, no UI, no phone, no watermark, no border, no tiny details, no blood, no weapon, no copyrighted character.
